positive: A whimsical storybook illustration of a glowing mushroom village nestled in a bioluminescent forest. Tiny, friendly woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls) interact with glowing flora. Highly detailed, soft watercolor style, deep emerald and sapphire tones, magical atmosphere, volumetric lighting, storybook art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, harsh shadows
